title: Zonne's Duplication
description: Allows simple highly configurable item duplication in minecraft.
body:
# Zonne's Duplication Mod

This mod adds a simple highly configurable duplication command working with cheats disabled.

---

Features:

- /dupe (amount*dupeamount)
- /megadupe (amount^dupeamount)
- /d and /md (Shortened variants of the commands above)

The configuration file allows setting a duplication limit to both commands individually, setting command error messages, and allows disabling any of the 4 added commands.

There is also an option to have duplicating cost XP levels or points, and one to disable bottle of enchanting duplication.

The mod also includes a helpful unstackable item fix making megadupe function like normal dupe with unstackable items (can be disabled in config)

---

Zonnes Duplication was tested on 1.21.4 and 1.21.8, but works on any version inbetween.

Join the [discord](https://discord.gg/MGc2zZK8bE) for support or for reporting bugs.
